mapper.select: SELECT t.*, prd.prod_nm AS prod_nm, ste.site_nm AS site_nm FROM pd_prod_tag t LEFT JOIN pd_prod prd ON prd.prod_id = t.prod_id LEFT JOIN sy_site ste ON ste.site_id = t.site_id WHERE t.prod_tag_id = #{id}

SELECT t.*, prd.prod_nm AS prod_nm, ste.site_nm AS site_nm FROM pd_prod_tag t LEFT JOIN pd_prod prd ON prd.prod_id = t.prod_id LEFT JOIN sy_site ste ON ste.site_id = t.site_id
ORDER BY t.prod_tag_id ASC ORDER BY t.prod_tag_id DESC ORDER BY t.reg_date ASC ORDER BY t.reg_date DESC ORDER BY t.reg_date DESC
